page_metadata.biotools__summary: Taking as input one or several sets of position-specific scoring matrices, this program applies hierarchical clustering to identify clusters of similar motifs. It produces a set of trees (one per cluster) and builds branch motifs at each node of each tree by merging the matrices of all descendent nodes.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Taking as input one or several sets of position-specific scoring matrices, this program applies hierarchical clustering to identify clusters of similar motifs. It produces a set of trees (one per cluster) and builds branch motifs at each node of each tree by merging the matrices of all descendent nodes.
